responsibilities: Design and implement modular ROS2-based software architectures that integrate perception, planning, and control subsystems for autonomous robots
Develop high-performance C++ and Python code to drive real-time robotic behaviors under strict latency and memory constraints
Build and maintain motion planning and trajectory generation algorithms that enable safe robot navigation in dynamic environments
Architect and implement state machines and behavior trees to coordinate complex multi-step autonomous robot task execution
Write and maintain unit, integration, and simulation tests using Gazebo to validate robot software before hardware deployment
Collaborate with hardware and perception teams to define clean software interfaces between sensors, actuators, and control modules
Optimize multithreaded and concurrent code to meet real-time performance requirements on embedded and onboard robot computers
Set up and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate build, test, and deployment of robotics software across robot fleets
Debug field issues and analyze robot log data to diagnose software faults and improve system reliability
